prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic Eid al-Adha portrait scene during golden sunset in an elegant Middle Eastern street market filled with glowing lanterns, luxury fabrics, hanging fairy lights, and warm festive atmosphere.
A beautiful stylish young woman with short fluffy wavy brown hair (face similar to reference image), soft hazel eyes, glossy lips, and natural radiant makeup stands confidently in the center while gently holding a decorated baby goat wrapped in luxury embroidered fabric.
She wears an elegant modern modest fashion outfit: flowing satin ivory abaya with gold embroidery, layered jewelry, soft silk hijab hanging loosely from shoulders, designer sunglasses resting on head, and classy golden heels.
Camera style: cinematic paparazzi-style candid shot, low-angle photography, shallow depth of field, luxury editorial aesthetic, realistic skin texture, DSLR realism, Vogue Arabia inspired composition, warm bokeh lights everywhere.
Around her:
– one fluffy sheep wearing tiny flower accessories looking at camera
– a mischievous baby goat standing on a fruit cart eating flowers
– tiny pigeons flying dramatically through the frame
– children in festive clothes running happily in background
– elegant Eid market sellers smiling naturally
Background: glowing Islamic architecture, luxurious Arabic bazaar street, hanging lanterns, warm orange sunset sky, smoke from street food stalls, sparkling lights reflecting on stone streets, rich cultural Eid atmosphere.
Lighting: warm golden-hour sunlight mixed with cinematic lantern glow, soft shadows, dreamy highlights, realistic HDR photography, subtle film grain, luxury warm tones.
Add stylish subtle doodles only around corners instead of full chaos: elegant gold sparkles, handwritten Arabic calligraphy style “Eid Mubarak”, tiny crescent moons, luxury sticker aesthetic, soft glowing particles.
Mood & aesthetic: luxury Eid fashion campaign, cinematic Arab street realism, classy festive energy, emotional warm holiday vibe, rich Instagram editorial aesthetic, wholesome but premium atmosphere, soft cinematic storytelling.
Typography overlay: elegant handwritten golden text saying:
“Eid Nights & Golden Lights ✨”
Aspect ratio: 9:16 vertical.
